query_text: Endometrial adenocarcinoma FFPE with matched plasma, FIGO staged. Histotype documented (endometrioid vs serous vs clear cell). Treatment-naive pre-hysterectomy specimens. N >= 50 paired.

parsed.histology_required: adenocarcinoma — endometrioid, serous, or clear cell histotype documented
parsed.assay_context: Endometrial cancer molecular subtyping — POLE mutation, MMR status, p53 status profiling for TCGA-like classification
